name: LOD Structure
uniques: Can be built outside your borders
Ensures a minimum tile yield of [+5 Gold, +5 Science, +5 Production, +5 Happiness, +5 Culture, +5 Food]
Can also be built on tiles adjacent to fresh water
Tile provides yield without assigned population
[+5 Gold, +5 Science, +5 Production, +5 Happiness, +5 Culture, +5 Food] <starting from the [Classical era]>
